text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to leave the studio after<n>finishing my
task at hand when I<n>notice Yukino Bijin practicing
her<n>dancing.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yeppers! I wanna have a spiffy dance<n>to show
off at the winn'n concerts<n>too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
choice_data_list: You looked so cute dancing your heart out.
You looked so cute dancing your heart out.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
But, uh... won't I look kinda plain?<n>'Specially next
to all the others...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... D-do you know how I can add<n>some
razzle dazzle t'my concerts?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
That's a swell idea! You're so right!<n>What's
lack'n from my danc'n is<n>some oomph!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
choice_data_list: I think you need more practice.
I think you need more practice.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Being flashy sure is hard...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Acrobatics... Y'mean like backflips?!<n>That sounds
pretty tough...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
No! I gotta do at least that much if I<n>wanna be a
real city girl!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! I can't b'lieve how<n>embarrass'n that
was! I'm such a<n>dund'rheeead!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Half her words are lost in her wail<n>and the other
half in her heavy accent,<n>but it's pretty clear that
she's<n>completely mortified.
